vuGetMailSecurity()

vuGetMailSecurity(*CSTRING OutUser,*CSTRING OutPassword,*LONG OutSecurityMode,*LONG OutUseSsl),SIGNED,PROC,PASCAL,RAW,NAME('vuGetMailSecurity')

Description

This is the legacy vuMail function name.

Preferred function name:

  • vuSmtpGetSecurity()

This function is exported for backward compatibility and behaves identically to vuSmtpGetSecurity().
